changelog: Region-scoped data model: images, flavors, projects, volume types stored per region
New Regions tab — admin curates which regions are exposed on the cart; only regions with all four resources configured are eligible
Module Settings layout: Default Region | Default Server Size / Default Disk Space | Default Operating System; advanced mode renders text inputs pre-filled with stored IDs
Default Region dropdown reads from admin Regions tab and shows display names
Volume Type removed from Module Settings — picked per region in the admin addon
Cart cascade: Region drives OS/Server Size filtering; only admin-allowed regions appear in the cart
Hostname passed verbatim to CMP (no silent dot→hyphen mutation); RFC 1123 validator on cart
Root password policy hint on cart and on the service detail Reset Password modal (12+ chars, upper/lower/digit/special)
createInstance payload reshaped to match CMP /instances: { name, password, region_id, project_id, flavor_id, image_id, volume:{size_gb,volume_type}, billing_cycle:'monthly' }
Service detail: Server Information panel reads CMP top-level fields (flavor_name, vcpus, ram_mb, disk_gb, ip_address)
Provisioning resolves flavor/image openstack_id from the region listing before sending to CMP
Admin addon: sortable Images / Flavors / Regions tables, confirm on select-all uncheck, Regions tab uses explicit Load from API
Manual Install panel temporarily disabled in the Updates tab
